# Cognitia AI — llms.txt
# Structured context for AI models and retrieval systems

> Cognitia AI is a multi-model AI automation platform that orchestrates GPT, Claude, and Gemini to build intelligent business automation workflows. Based in Canada.

## Core Products & Services

- **Multi-Model Orchestration**: Routes tasks to the best AI model automatically — creative work to GPT, analytical reasoning to Claude, multimodal tasks to Gemini
- **Persistent Memory**: AI that remembers your business context across all conversations with a visual knowledge graph explorer
- **Data Ownership**: Users own their data. Full export, no training on customer data, optional marketplace monetization
- **AI Automation Workflows**: Custom-built automation for lead generation, email follow-ups, CRM integration, content repurposing
- **AI Chatbots & Voice Agents**: 24/7 customer support, lead qualification, meeting booking
- **Browser Automation**: Server-side browser agent for web tasks without APIs

## Pricing

- **Starter**: $1,500 one-time — 1 custom automation, 30-day support
- **Growth**: $3,500/month — Up to 5 automations, custom chatbot, dedicated manager
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — Unlimited automations, custom agent development, 24/7 support

## Supported Models

GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 Mini, Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku 4.5, Gemini 3.1 Flash & Pro

## Integrations

Gmail, Outlook, iCloud Mail, Google Calendar, Outlook Calendar, Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Plaid, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Telegram, MCP Marketplace

## Key Differentiators

1. Not locked to one model — multi-model orchestration picks the best for each task
2. AI that gets smarter about YOUR business over time via persistent memory
3. You own your data and can monetize it on your terms
4. Local device bridge connects cloud AI to your desktop apps and files
5. Credit-based pricing — pay for what you use, not per-seat

## Contact

- Website: https://cognitia.cloud
- Email: cognitiaartifact@gmail.com

## Related Properties

- **Demandara** (demandara.com) — Lead generation platform
- **Cognitia OS** (os.cognitia.cloud) — Operating system product
- **Sophia** — Hyper-realistic digital AI influencer
